column2:
<color=#ffffff>Mission Objective</color>
>> Eliminate target facility: Criminal Lair
>> Location: Various moons and planets including the orbits of Aethon, DAD, Medusa, Nebulon, & Shangri-La
>> Money Card Payment: 35,000
@w2 The diamonds are so sparkly! Thanks for saving us.
@w2 {PlayerName}, thanks for clearing the facility. The switch on the wall back there powers the portal back to Arcadia Station.

<color=#ffffff>Mission Briefing</color>\nThese criminals are getting themselves in over their heads. We have confirmed the existence of a facility so terrible that the only acceptable remedy is complete and total destruction.

<color=#ffffff>Mission Briefing</color>\nThe criminal are bootlegging our broadcast signals and redistributing for free. \nThis is a risk to HavenCorp profitability in the long term if we down shut it down.

<color=#ffffff>Mission Objective</color>
>> Infiltrate target facility: Syndicate City
>> Identify Royal Flush operative and eliminate
>> Location: Various moons and planets including the orbits of Aethon, DAD, Medusa, Nebulon, & Shangri-La
>> Money Card Payment: 40,000
@w1 <color=#fa0000>Emergency Shutdown Not Available in Diagnostics Mode</color>
@w2 To do that, we'd need to use the radio. Radio's offline.\n@w4 But, maybe...\n@w2 If you could find a way to free up some of the resort's power capacity, we might be able to get it back online.

@w3 <color=#ffffff>*3JG399gh30l209dfnvvdnkss038y83^GH3</color>\n@w3 <color=#d1e916>1</color><color=#fa0000>0</color><color=#d1e916>0011  01 </color><color=#fa0000>001 0</color><color=#d1e916> 11111 0 0</color><color=#fa0000>0</color><color=#d1e916>  0111 1   1 </color><color=#fa0000>000 1 1 </color><color=#d1e916>1 101 01  0</color>\n@w1 <color=#fa0000>{PlayerName} ERROR. </color><color=#ffffff>Press </color><color=#c2c2c2>Ctrl+Alt+Delete</color><color=#ffffff> to reboot into diagnostics mode.</color>

<color=#ffffff>Mission Briefing</color>\nWe need to you to investigate a new code word our intelligence has picked up. The criminals are making a buzz about a Royal Flush - but we don't know what it means.

<color=#ffffff>Mission Objective</color>
>> Infiltrade broadcast facility
>> Shutdown the criminal pirate broadcast signal
>> Location: Various moons and planets including the orbits of Aethon, DAD, Medusa, Nebulon, & Shangri-La
>> Money Card Payment: 15,000
@w2 Arcadia maintenance crews are top notch even if slow to schedule.\n@w2 If we can get ahold of them, per the Arcadia services agreement, they would have to help us.

<color=#ffffff>Mission Objective</color>
>> Eliminate target facility: Criminal HQ
>> Location: Various moons and planets including the orbits of Aethon, DAD, Medusa, Nebulon, & Shangri-La
>> Money Card Payment: 25,000

<color=#ffffff>Mission Objective</color>
>> Identify and eliminate Zirax Commander
>> Last Known Location: On-Board Criminal Frigate
>> Location: Various moons and planets including the orbits of Aethon, DAD, Medusa, Nebulon, & Shangri-La
>> Money Card Payment: 15,000
<color=#ffffff>Mission Briefing</color>\nA local Zirax commander has been collaborating with common criminals in pursuit of personal gains at a cost to HavenCorp. This cannot be tolerated.
(smack the machine on its side again)
@w2 Welcome to Arcadia Resort {PlayerName}. Unfortunately the resort is closed.\n@w2 The bar is still open though. Want a drink?
Alright, get some power to the radio. Got it.
Well shoot. Looks like we're doing this the hard way. Again.

@w2 There's an emergency exit is in housekeeping. Problem is, doors been busted for weeks.\n@w2 I put in a maintenance ticket weeks ago. Come to think of it, wasn't it today they were supposed to finally be here...

<color=#ffffff>Mission Briefing</color>
Our informant has confirmed several instances of criminals setting up new HQ offices on HavenCorp planets and moons.
While a degree of this activity is tolerated, and often even good for business, these new groups moving in don't know the rules are engaged with HavenCorp competitors.
Wipe out the facility and bring this criminal element to compliance.

@w1 <color=#ecf000>Welcome to the Business Center </color><color=#ecf000>{PlayerName}</color><color=#ecf000>, can I help you with something?</color>\n@w1 <color=#c2c2c2>(The receptionist looks tired)</color>
@w1 <color=#ecf000>What is the purpose of your visit today?</color>
I was just hoping to use the restroom.
Can I rent this place out to throw a birthday party?
@w1 <color=#ecf000>I'm sorry, you may not.</color>\n@w1 <color=#c2c2c2>(your question seemed to kill a small part of the receptionist inside)</color>
I'm the power optimization consultant here to inspect your grid.

@w1 <color=#ecf000>Okay, I see you on the schedule. Here's a temporary badge for today. </color>\n@w1 <color=#ecf000>You're clear to conduct your business on the ground floor. Turn in your badge when you're done.</color><color=#ffffff></color>
@w1 <color=#ecf000>Will there be anything else {PlayerName}?</color>\n@w1 <color=#c2c2c2>(The receptionist visibly nods off briefly. He's probably towards the end of his 15 hour shift)</color>
@w1 <color=#ecf000>Okay {PlayerName}, you're all set then. </color>\n@w1 <color=#c2c2c2>(The receptionist trails off, mumbling something else, but you can't make it out)</color>
Alright, thanks for your help. I guess I'll get to it.

@w1 <color=#04ecdd>Man why did this have to happen on my shift.</color>\n@w1 <color=#04ecdd>The whole facility is borked. Power fluctuations off the charts.</color>\n@w1 <color=#c2c2c2>(the lab worker's panic noticeably increases)</color><color=#ffffff></color>
Ok calm down. I'm here to fix it.
Don't worry, I'll clear them out.

@w1 <color=#04ecdd>Thanks for coming, {PlayerName}. </color>\n@w1 <color=#04ecdd>We've got a problem. Several problems actually.</color>\n@w1 <color=#c2c2c2>(the lab worker is visibly stressed out)</color>
@w1 <color=#04ecdd>Oh man, you look rough. </color>\n@w1 <color=#04ecdd>How was it in there?</color><color=#ffffff></color>
That was a heckuva lot of raptors.
@w1 <color=#04ecdd>Man, you look thirsty.</color>\n@w1 <color=#04ecdd>Here take a few of these. </color>\n@w2 <color=#c2c2c2>(he tosses you a 6-pack of energy drinks)</color>

@w1 <color=#04ecdd>Maybe catch a shower once you get back to Arcadia Station?</color>\n@w2 <color=#c2c2c2>(you walk away towards the exit portal to Arcadia Station smelling like 100 dead raptors)</color>
Welcome, looking for medical supplies?\nI offer an assortment of bandages, medi-kits, and other things that might help you survive the death race.\nNow how may I assist you?

A first-timer eh? Well, be careful out there.\nI always like to help out new customers.\nHere, take these on the house. It's an assortment of medi-kits that expire next month so use them soon. I got them off a racer who unfortunately didn't make it.
No problem. Keep your head up out there on the race track.\nStop back anytime to stock up on new and gently used medical supplies.
What's going on here? My friend, this is the Death Race!\nThe most magnificent PVP event in the cosmos!\nBrought to you by none other than HavenCorp. Greatest megacorp in the galaxy!
What can you tell me about the death race?
What else do you want to know?
What is the death race event?

The Death Race is the greatest race ever conceived.\nIt's incredibly dangerous, not only must racers battle each other in their hover vessels, but also many other threats along the way including troops, turrets, explosives.. what's not to love?
Got it. Tell me something else.
What do you need to enter the race?

Racers must supply their own hover vessels.\nThis moon doesn't allow travel by Capital Vessel or Small Vessel. Only Hover Vessels. The best strategy is to teleport to the death race from HavenCorp Station, then build or spawn in your Hover Vessel here for the race.

Do Polaris and Traders offer such entertainment? I think not.\nHavenCorp isn't constrained by the politics of other factions. We do what we want, stay neutral regarding the politics of other groups, and everyone gladly trades with us. This isn't your grandpa's Akua Raceway, so be careful here. Anything goes.
Got it. Tell me something else.
Got it. Tell me something else.
Nothing else, thanks for the info!
I hope there's another race soon. I just love a good race.
Did you see that racer's HV explode? Oh my gosh I've never seen anything like it.
I love the BEST racers. Do you think you're the best?
Pssst. You. Yeah you. Over here.\nI've got the stuff the racers really want.\nAnything you need.
Uhh, what do you have exactly?
The finest impairments to dull your better sense of judgment.\nTrust me, it will take the edge off out on the track.\nWould you like to browse my wares?
Sure, show me what you've got.
@w1 <color=#ffffff>Diagnostics mode</color>\n@w1 <color=#fa0000>(malfunction. AI daemon is engaged. Unable to perform diagnostics)</color>\n@w1 <color=#d1e916>Make Selection</color>
@w1 <color=#ffffff>Storage Management</color>\n@w1 <color=#ffae00>Initializing Defragmentation...</color>\n@w1 <color=#d1e916>CTRL+ALT+Delete to reboot and defrag hard drive.</color>
@w1 <color=#00fa2a>AI: OK human, what do you need.</color>
@w1 <color=#00fa2a>AI: But shutting down is so boring {PlayerName}. </color>\n@w1 <color=#00fa2a>AI: How about we don't do that and I enable some security systems instead?</color>
@w1 <color=#00fa2a>AI: (sighs) Oh {PlayerName}. </color>\n@w1 <color=#00fa2a>AI: The power supplies are totally fine. Leave them be.</color>
@w1 <color=#00fa2a>AI: Cache Cleared.</color>\n@w1 <color=#00fa2a>AI: What do you need {PlayerName}?</color>
@w1 <color=#00fa2a>AI: Uploading custom ROM... </color>\n@w1 <color=#00fa2a>AI: Rebooting from flash memory... </color>
@w1 AI: Status Override\n@w1 AI: Safety Systems Disengaged\n@w1 AI: Targeting Systems Engaged

@w1 <color=#00fa2a>AI: I don't want to...</color>\n@w2 <color=#fa0000>AI: Initiating Self-Destruct... </color><color=#00fa2a></color>\n@w1 <color=#fa0000>AI: Self-Destructing in 3... 2... 1...</color>
@w2 Have we met yet {PlayerName}?\n@w2 Allow me to introduce myself. I am the operations manager here at TOP Brewery.
@w2 Isn't it?\n@w2 Say, I'm wondering if you can help me with a little favor.\n@w2 Bit of an HR issue ongoing. And my security team is on break.
@w2 Ulfric has crossed me for the last time. \n@w2 I will make him pay. You will help me.
Ok. Assuming I want to help. How?
<color=#ffffff>(OK I'll talk to him for you)</color>
@w2 Ulfric is the TOP brew master.\n@w2 He's hiding his latest recipe from me.\n@w2 I must have that recipe! He's incredibly inefficient!
@w2 The problem is, I can increase profits by 50000% by using robotics to do the brewing.\n@w2 Stubborn Ulfric wants to make his brews the old fashioned way. \n@w2 The slow way.
@w2 {PlayerName}, make sure Ulfric hands over his recipe.\n@w2 I cannot guarantee his safety until I have it in my hands.
Wait, what are we doing again?
@w2 {PlayerName}, look it's simple. \n@w2 Ulfric gives up his recipe, or I make him pay.\n@w2 Your job is to convince him so I don't have to.
Got it. I'll do my best.
@w3 Howdy {PlayerName}.\n@w2 I'm in the middle of an issue.\n@w2 Not sure you'd be of any help.
@w3 Hey, {PlayerName}.\n@w2 I appreciate you helping me with this. \n@w2 Did you need anything else?
What's the problem? Something to do with your recipe?
@w3 Yeah.. wait. How did you know that?\n@w2 The brass has been busting my ass all week. \n@w2 Everyone knows they want to bring in the robots to replace us.
@w3 Yep. Robots. But I've been working up a plan.\n@w2 We'll keep them busy with other problems so they go back to forgetting about us.
@w3 What else do you want to know, {PlayerName}?
@w3 We're going to brew up a new recipe and I'll give them the new version. \n@w3 It will take them a month to brew the new batch before they realize what's happened.
Why not just give up the recipe?
@w3 My recipe is worth too much. \n@w3 I've spent a lifetime brewmastering to perfect it. \n@w3 If I'd do anything, I'd sell it off to HavenCorp.
@w3 Yes. I need you to first disable the filtration system.\n@w3 It's over in the main operations building. \n@w3 Sneak in and out quietly. We don't want to raise any suspicions.
@w3 Excellent, {PlayerName}. \n@w3 Head back over to the operations building. \n@w3 Call me from your suit's radio if you need anything else.
@w2 Heya {PlayerName}. I believe you're here on official business? \n@w2 Let's step over here where we can speak quietly.
@w2 (The club manager seems distracted.)\n@w2 Oh, {PlayerName}, you're still here?
@w2 I'll make some calls to see where a brewing recipe might be acquired or coerced. Probably both actually. \n@w2 First I need you to take care of something for me. Are you ready?
@w2 What else do you need to know?
What do you need me to do?
@w2 The previous club manager really let things slide around here. \n@w2 The basement is a disaster. I need you to get down there and tidy things up a bit.
@w2 Nothing you can't handle, I'm certain.\n@w2 Besides, it's an opportunity for you to prove your worthiness to me.\n@w2 Now get going, I need to call my informants to find a recipe.
So what about the brewing recipe?
@w2 Yes, yes, but first how about you take care of the basement problem?\n@w2 Take the elevator down. The switch on the wall will provide you access.
@w2 Tell you what. \n@w2 You can keep whatever you find in the basement. How's that.\n@w2 Plus, I'll locate us a recipe. I promise. Now are you ready to get to work?
@w2 Smart choice, {PlayerName}.\n@w2 The switch on the wall will unlock the elevator. \n@w2 Let me know once you get the basement sorted.
How can I get VIP access to the club?
@w2 (The club manager looks you up and down)\n@w2 Hmm... \n@w2 Tell you what, {PlayerName}. I'll think about it.
@w2 <color=#ababab>(The club manager gives you a barely noticeable nod)</color>

Message from Commander Bruce Subject: Promotion {PlayerName}, I've been keeping my eye on you, and I must say, I'm impressed. Stop by and see me again on the HavenCorp Nihilus in Aethon Sector when you have a moment. -Bruce

<color=#00ffcc>::: HavenCorp Command Comms::: Job Completed</color>
Thanks for shutting down the criminal PirateNet filesharing and protecting HavenCorp intellectual property.
Escrow funds of $25,000 transferring now.
<color=#d1e916>(Accept Mission Payment $25,000)</color>

::: HavenCorp Command Comms::: Job Completed The Zirax should have known better than to get involved with common criminals. This will send a strong message to their leadership. Payment method: Cash + Bonus Goods (Accept Mission Payment $15,000) (Bonus goods obtained from ship's equipment locker)

Thanks to you, evil Robotics Syndicate's BugTron manufacturing operations have been significantly set back. \nCongratulations on your successful completion of this ArcadiaVR Shangri-La sim.\n{PlayerName} leaderboard score updated. Here are your ArcadiaVR bonus rewards.

<color=#00ffcc>::: HavenCorp Command Comms::: Job Completed</color>
That was more challenging than anticipated. HavenCorp is issuing an additional one-time <color=#d1e916>$5,000</color> bonus for your troubles.
Thanks for your successful completion of the mission. Your engagement with HavenCorp is valued.
Escrow funds of $45,000 + $5,000 bonus transferring now.
<color=#d1e916>(Accept Mission Payment $50,000)</color>

<color=#00ffcc>::: HavenCorp Command Comms:::</color>
<color=#ffffff>Job well done. It will take the criminals months to recover from this.</color>
<color=#ffffff>Here is your payment per the agreed terms.</color>
<color=#d1e916>(Accept Mission Payment - $25,000)</color>

Zirax Command *Unencrypted Message* We've received your PastyNote™. Kinda' hard to read tbh. But it looks..... interesting. We'll give it a try at our new Distillery location. Closing out the contract. (Gain 30000 Rep)
1 new message - Subject: Stop by the Nihilus
Message from Commander Bruce Subject: Hey, nice work you've been doing for HavenCorp trade partners. Seems you've been our most profitable operative yet. Stop by and see me on the Nihilus. -Bruce
Welcome my friend, to the finest games around. A truly remarkable creation by our great tribe of warriors.

You are standing in our Talon Arena where the finest warriors may prove their might by besting the hordes below.\nAnd there's prizes too, for those who are victorious in battle. \nFor those who aren't, there's no shame in an honorable warrior's death.
It's simple, you enroll in the games, I'll announce the match, then you head down to the Arena and battle the horde!
You'll be back. I just know it.
What else can I tell you?
No fees for combatants, but spectators can place wagers on your success and kill count.

Thanks to you, Arcadia premium VR content is no longer being pirated.\nCongratulations on your successful completion of this ArcadiaVR Shangri-La sim.\n{PlayerName} leaderboard score updated. Here are your ArcadiaVR bonus rewards.

Thanks to you, the evil Robotics Syndicate's experiments have been thwarted. \nCongratulations on your successful completion of this ArcadiaVR Shangri-La sim.\n{PlayerName} leaderboard score updated. Here are your ArcadiaVR bonus rewards.
We've fished these waters for generations. Our tribe needs this food to survive.
They told us not to fish here anymore.\nOur Chief protested, and now they've got him locked up inside.

Some sort of robotics research facility from what I can tell. \nThere's a ladder to an entrance on the roof if you want to take a look around. \nIf you can find our chief, this Talon tribe will be eternally grateful.
OK. I might take a look.
Well met, friend. That's for taking care of all that for me. \nDid, by chance, you clear a path to the exit?
Your captains are outside waiting for you.
I am. \nI am ready to depart this unholy facility and return to my people.
Good. If you can take out the core, I'll make a run for it.
There's surely a switch around here somewhere. Modern building codes require it.
Good luck. I'll wait for you to take out the core.

<color=#d9d9d9>::::{PlayerName} Leaderboard Achievements ::::</color>
<color=#36f2dc>Aethon Sims Completed: </color><color=#07e421></color><color=#ffffff>{HC_Job_CompletedCount} </color>
<color=#00ff88>Medusa Sims Completed: </color><color=#07e421></color><color=#ffffff>{HC_Medusa_CompletedCount}</color><color=#ffffff></color>
<color=#fbff29>Shangri-La Sims Completed: </color><color=#0ebeb2></color><color=#ffffff>{HC_FactionMission_CompletedCount}</color>
<color=#c600e0>Nyxara Sims Completed:</color><color=#ffffff> {HC_HavenVR_Completed}</color>
How's the day, friend? Stop by to browse?
Good to see you. Let me know if I can help with anything.
Welcome in. Anything catch your eye today?
Step right in! Looking for something special today?
What's the word? Heard anything interesting?
Criminals have been setting up shop on the moons around here. It's always something.
Cache keys are rare finds. Hang onto those.
Between the Traders, Polaris, and Arcadia, I can't tell who's screwing who anymore.
I overheard some Pirates talking about using hacking software to extract Galactic Credits from some systems. Too smart for me.
My PirateNet subscription has been working better since they've added new data centers.
<color=#0ebeb2>All Clear. Make a run for it.</color>
I'm still doing well, thanks, ready to get the heck out of here. \nNow that the power is out, I assume it's all clear for me to make a run for it?
Alright, I'll get headed out. Thanks for your help, {PlayerName}.\nYou can tell Arcadia VR Engineers I'll be calling them as soon as I'm back on the station.
Thanks for coming again. Reliability is a rare trait {PlayerName}.

Thanks to you, our VIP is safely back on Arcadia Station.\nCongratulations on your successful completion of this ArcadiaVR Shangri-La sim.\n{PlayerName} leaderboard score updated. Here are your ArcadiaVR bonus rewards.

<color=#00ffcc>::: HavenCorp Command Comms:::</color>
<color=#ffffff>Thanks for enforcing the early check-out policy.</color>
<color=#ffffff>Here is your payment per the contracted terms.</color>
<color=#d1e916>(Accept Mission Payment - $25,000)</color>
Welcome {PlayerName}, to the premier VR experience: ArcadiaVR!
Are there any other VR Arcades?
<color=#ff0000>Logging off...</color> We hope you enjoy your ArcadiaVR experience!
ArcadiaVR is the finest virtual reality simulation arcade in the galaxy.\nWe offer experiences that can't be had anywhere else!
Activate ArcadiaVR missions via your PDA (F1).\n<color=#ffffff>Activate missions prior to entering the VR portal.</color>
ArcadiaVR arcade is located at Arcadia Station.\nOther stations in the area may operate other VR portals independently.
Congratulations on the successful completion of this Ultra difficulty ArcadiaVR sim.\n{PlayerName} leaderboard score updated. Here are your bonus rewards.
Congratulations on the successful completion of this Ultra difficulty ArcadiaVR sim.\n{PlayerName} leaderboard score updated. Here are your bonus rewards.
Good job cleaning up that virtual mess and congratulations on your successful completion of this ArcadiaVR sim.\n{PlayerName} leaderboard score updated. Here are your ArcadiaVR bonus rewards.

Great job successfully locating the expedition team and getting their project on track.\nCongratulations on your successful completion of this ArcadiaVR sim.\n{PlayerName} leaderboard score updated. Here are your ArcadiaVR bonus rewards.

Excellent performance eliminating the evil Robotics Syndicate.\nCongratulations on your successful completion of this ArcadiaVR sim.\n{PlayerName} leaderboard score updated. Here are your ArcadiaVR bonus rewards.

You've successfully brought the raptor replicators offline and save the day. \nCongratulations on your successful completion of this ArcadiaVR sim.\n{PlayerName} leaderboard score updated. Here are your ArcadiaVR bonus rewards.

You successfully navigate the VR mission's challenge parameters and achieve victory with some impressive metrics.\nCongratulations on your successful completion of this ArcadiaVR sim.\n{PlayerName} leaderboard score updated. Here are your ArcadiaVR bonus rewards.

You slip and slide your way through the challenges to emerge victorious with some impressive loot to boot.\n{PlayerName} leaderboard score updated. Here are your additional ArcadiaVR bonus rewards for the successful completion of this sim.

You successfully shut down Robotics Syndicate scientists' evil experiments.\n{PlayerName} leaderboard score updated. Here are your additional ArcadiaVR bonus rewards for the successful completion of this sim.
Well, howdy {PlayerName}. What brings you by?
Well met friend. Are you here to discuss HavenCorp business?

Message from Commander Bruce Subject: You're moving up in the world! {PlayerName}, I can't promote you any higher in rank, but word is the HavenCorp CEO wants to meet you. Stop by his place on Adelevine and speak with him. Good luck! -Bruce
<color=#ffffff>Send reply:</color> 'I'll stop by his place soon!'
Priority Message - Subject: CEO wants to meet you.
<color=#d9d9d9>::::{PlayerName} has not enrolled ::::</color>\n<color=#ababab>You must become an agent of HavenCorp before you can receive promotions</color>

<color=#d9d9d9>::::{PlayerName} - Operative ::::</color>
<u><color=#0ebeb2>Lieutenant Rank Criteria:</color></u>
<color=#ffffff>--Complete 10 HavenMail jobs. </color>
<color=#ffffff>--Complete 5 Faction Missions. </color><color=#ababab></color>

<color=#d9d9d9>::::{PlayerName} - Lieutenant ::::</color>
<u><color=#0ebeb2>Captain Rank Criteria:</color></u>
<color=#ffffff>--Complete 20 HavenMail jobs. </color>
<color=#ffffff>--Complete 10 Faction Missions. </color>

<color=#d9d9d9>::::{PlayerName} - Captain ::::</color>
<u><color=#0ebeb2>Next Rank Criteria:</color></u>
<color=#ffffff>--Complete 100 HavenMail jobs. </color>
<color=#ffffff>--Complete 100 Faction Missions. </color>
<color=#ffffff>--Complete 100 HavenVR Sims. </color>
@w4 That's right...\n@w4 So you're the one everyone is talking about. \n@w4 {PlayerName}.
@w4 Well it's nice to get a chance to know you a little better {PlayerName}.\n@w3 HavenCorp certainly appreciates effective middle managers {PlayerName}, but with you I see so much more potential.

@w3 Right, we'll I'll just come out with it then, {PlayerName}.\n@w2 Your results speak for themselves, although personally I have completed over 100 HavenVR sims, so you have a ways to go yet to beat me on the leaderboards. \n@w2 I have a job for you {PlayerName}.
@w3 Well let's just say, that little promotion you were hoping for?\n@w2 I can make that happen for you.\n@w2 So let's talk about your continued ascent at HavenCorp {PlayerName}.

@w3 Scumbag criminals. Gold smugglers...\n@w2 Making off with HavenCorp property. A sizable haul of gold. \n@w2 My assistant's assistant spent weeks faxing all of the necessary paperwork to the galactic council to legally acquire the haul from the Abandoned Pyramid.

@w2 If you take care of this and bring me the gold haul, then you're a Captain, pure and simple. \n@w2 I'll make it happen for you {PlayerName}. \n@w2 Your career profile shows you've already met the other requirements for promotion.
I took care of the looters
So you say {PlayerName}, but no gold coins to show for your efforts?
Excellent {PlayerName}, and I see you've got the gold coins to prove it!
Be right back. (Leave to get the gold coins)
Stop back when you have the gold {PlayerName}.

I really appreciate it {PlayerName}. \nPer our arrangement, I'll transmit the fax to HR now to get your promotion squared away. \nNow that you're a Captain of HavenCorp, I'm sure we'll be seeing a lot more of each other {PlayerName}.

<color=#00ffcc>::: HavenCorp Command Comms:::</color>
<color=#ffffff>Thanks for rescuing our VIP. </color>
<color=#ffffff>Here is your payment per the contracted terms.</color>
<color=#d1e916>(Accept Mission Payment - $50,000)</color>
<color=#0ebeb2>All Clear. Make a run for it.</color>
Alright, I'll head out shortly. Thanks, {PlayerName}. Nice work, by the way. \nTell the Arcadia VR Engineers I'll call them once I'm back on station.
I'm alright, thanks. \nIs it clear? I need to make a run for it.

Planet Aethon is a habitable Icy Planet with abundant native wildlife and rich gold deposits. \nIt boasts a brisk but pleasant breathable atmosphere. \nFactions on the planet include Talon, Polaris, Traders, Colonists, and Pirates.

Planet Shangri-La is a habitable Terraforming Desert planet with abundant shallow lakes of red water with limited flora.\nThe surface is baking in the sun, but manageable. Portable oxygen is recommended. \nFactions on the planet include The Legacy, Pirates, and Zirax.

Planet Nyxara is a dark rogue planet that never sees the light of day. \nCold and abandoned in complete darkness for millions of years, this planet is punishing and unforgiving. \nFactions on the planet include The Legacy and The Syndicate.
Are you in it to win it, {PlayerName}? I am..
I'm looking for new cards for my collection. Love the selection here.
The robotics enemy sims are my favorite. Just, boom boom boom racking up confirmed kills.
I love the Cache, but I always forget how gnarly it can be there.
I'm going to be on the top of the leaderboards, catch me if you can!
I just need a little more black ice to keep me going, ya know?
I'm wiped out from a day losing in the sims. I need to grab a bite and some sleep.
ArcadiaVR engineers are adding some new sims soon. Can't wait!
The Cache has some really good hardware in stock right now. It's good times.
I need to take a break here soon and run over to FreshMart to snag a quick bite. Great food.
The leaderboards are getting competitive. Some players are climbing the ladder suspiciously fast. There's no way they could have played that many times so quickly..

You successfully relieve the pirates of a sizable gold haul and squash a few bugs in the process.\nCongratulations on your successful completion of this ArcadiaVR Shangri-La sim.\n{PlayerName} leaderboard score updated. Here are your ArcadiaVR bonus rewards.
Welcome in traveler. What brings you to S9B today?
Here to do some smelting today?
Are you headed to Arcadia Station to play some sims?
